best_policy.reason_not_deployable: Uses controlled diagnostic metadata intervention_type == location_swap.

global_policy_rejection.reason: Global slot_mismatch_prob thresholds either destroy correct SUPPORT predictions or fail to reduce false SUPPORT.

group_observation.example_pattern: location mismatch such as claim Dublin vs evidence Cork

interpretation.remaining_question: Can a deployable location-mismatch condition be inferred without intervention_type or target metadata?

next_stage_recommendation.goal: Design/evaluate deployable location-mismatch detection signals to approximate the Stage139 upper-bound condition.
candidate_directions: Use exported claim/evidence core text to derive location mismatch features.
Analyze whether existing frame/location scalars separate location_swap false SUPPORTs from correct SUPPORTs.
Avoid intervention_type, slot_mismatch_target, gold labels, or diagnostic family metadata as inference signals.
Keep evaluation shadow-only before any final-logit integration.
avoid: using intervention_type as a deployable rule
routing conditional guard into final logits before deployable signal validation
claiming final model-consistent evidence from cross-run merge
